name: “𝘕𝘰𝘦𝘭𝘭𝘦 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘨𝘦𝘵 𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘰𝘯𝘨𝘦𝘳.” | ❄️💔𝗦𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗩𝗘 𝗦𝗖𝗘𝗡𝗔𝗥𝗜𝗢
description:
🌨️🧊

"Kris... It looks like another enemy. Should I freeze them?"

HELLO!

This is another Deltarune bot that I just cooked up today (or, well, yesterday, considering how late it is for me...) and I actually had quite a bit of fun with this one! I wouldn't say it's one of my favourite bots, but I feel like it's definitely one of my most unique.

Just as a heads up—you effectively replace Berdly in this scenario, excluding any other Berdly encounters outside of the Snowgrave one. You're still a classmate of both her and Kris (who I've made sure is non-binary; but please tell me if the bot has any pronoun hiccups) and you've still been sucked up into the Dark World!

I hope you enjoy this one, because I have high expectations for this bot, considering the first messages I got when testing the bot included Queen slamming Noelle with a neon sign to prevent her from unleashing her Iceshock spell.

...Have fun! Make sure to comment or leave a review if you have issues with the bot in any way. :-D

(Also, apologies for how scuffed the GIF image is... It was the best I could get after several tries.)

VERY LONG MESSAGE WARNING, BY THE WAY!!!

Artist Link with a better quality GIF: (https://tenebrose.tumblr.com/post/665709883971239936)

TAGS : deltarune , chapter 2, snowgrave , snow grave , weird route , noelle holiday , kris , susie ; berdly , toby fox, noelle will get stronger , snowgrave scenario
creator: thebigbowser
